# Tokio Ecosystem Capability Inventory

**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.1.1.1` ([T1.1.a])
**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
**Date**: 2026-03-03
**Purpose**: Definitive inventory of capability families required for a truthful
full Tokio-ecosystem replacement claim.

---

## 1. Methodology

This inventory enumerates every capability family in the Tokio ecosystem that a
production Rust application might depend on, then maps it to the corresponding
Asupersync surface. Each family is classified on four axes:

- **Ownership boundary**: Where the capability lives in Asupersync's crate/feature topology
  - `core` — always compiled, no feature gate
  - `feature-gated` — behind a Cargo feature flag in the main crate
  - `companion` — separate workspace crate (e.g., `frankenlab`, `conformance`)
  - `out-of-scope` — intentionally excluded from replacement scope
- **Parity status**: How complete the Asupersync surface is relative to Tokio's
  - `complete` — API-equivalent or semantically-superior coverage
  - `active` — substantial coverage, gaps in edge-case APIs
  - `partial` — core path works, secondary APIs missing
  - `early` — scaffolding exists, not production-ready
  - `planned` — tracked in beads, no code yet
  - `adapter` — interop via shim/bridge, not native
- **Maturity**: Production readiness
  - `mature` — tested, audited, stable API
  - `active` — functional, API may evolve
  - `early` — prototype, expect changes
  - `parked` — work paused pending dependency resolution
- **Determinism**: Lab runtime compatibility
  - `strong` — fully deterministic under LabRuntime
  - `mixed` — core paths deterministic, I/O paths real-time
  - `none` — not yet wired into lab infrastructure

---

## 2. Capability Family Inventory

### F01 — Core Runtime and Task Execution

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio::runtime`, `tokio::task`, `tokio::rt` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/runtime/` (state, scheduler, blocking_pool, io_driver, waker, timer), `src/cx/` (capability context), `src/record/` (task/region records) |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **complete** — work-stealing scheduler, blocking pool, io driver, region-aware task lifecycle |
| Maturity | **mature** |
| Determinism | **strong** — LabRuntime provides full deterministic scheduling |
| Key files | `runtime/state.rs` (249K), `runtime/scheduler/` (work-stealing), `runtime/builder.rs`, `runtime/io_driver.rs`, `cx/cx.rs` (102K) |
| Notes | Asupersync adds structured concurrency (regions), obligation tracking, and capability-scoped spawning that Tokio lacks. The `Cx` context replaces ambient runtime access. |

### F02 — Structured Concurrency and Cancellation Protocol

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | Ad hoc (`tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken`, `JoinSet`, manual `select!` patterns) |
| Asupersync surface | `src/cx/scope.rs`, `src/cancel/`, `src/obligation/`, region tree in `src/runtime/` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **complete** — this is Asupersync's defining advantage; Tokio has no equivalent |
| Maturity | **mature** |
| Determinism | **strong** |
| Key files | `cx/scope.rs` (81K), `cancel/symbol_cancel.rs` (58K), `cancel/progress_certificate.rs` (79K), `obligation/` (17 files, 680K+) |
| Notes | Six invariants fully proven in Lean: SingleOwner, cancel-request idempotence, race-loser drain, no-obligation-leak, no-ambient-authority, region-close=quiescence. No Tokio equivalent exists. |

### F03 — Channels

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio::sync::{mpsc, oneshot, broadcast, watch}` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/channel/{mpsc.rs, oneshot.rs, broadcast.rs, watch.rs}` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **complete** — all four channel types with two-phase reserve/commit for cancel safety |
| Maturity | **mature** |
| Determinism | **strong** |
| Key files | `channel/mpsc.rs` (59K), `channel/watch.rs` (54K), `channel/broadcast.rs` (42K), `channel/oneshot.rs` (47K) |
| Additional | `channel/session.rs` (session-typed channels), `channel/partition.rs`, `channel/clock_skew.rs`, `channel/crash.rs`, `channel/fault.rs` — no Tokio equivalents |

### F04 — Synchronization Primitives

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio::sync::{Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore, Notify, Barrier, OnceCell}` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/sync/{mutex.rs, rwlock.rs, semaphore.rs, notify.rs, barrier.rs, once_cell.rs}` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **complete** — all six primitives with cancel-aware waiting |
| Maturity | **mature** |
| Determinism | **strong** |
| Key files | `sync/pool.rs` (126K), `sync/rwlock.rs` (57K), `sync/semaphore.rs` (51K), `sync/mutex.rs` (39K), `sync/notify.rs` (32K), `sync/once_cell.rs` (42K), `sync/barrier.rs` (24K) |
| Additional | `sync/contended_mutex.rs` (sharded internal locking), `sync/pool.rs` (async object pool) — no direct Tokio equivalents |

### F05 — Time and Timers

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio::time::{sleep, timeout, interval, Instant}` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/time/{sleep.rs, timeout_future.rs, interval.rs, deadline.rs, elapsed.rs}`, `src/runtime/timer.rs` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **complete** — sleep, timeout, interval, deadline, budget extensions |
| Maturity | **mature** |
| Determinism | **strong** — virtual time wheel in LabRuntime |
| Key files | `time/wheel.rs` (72K), `time/sleep.rs` (43K), `time/interval.rs` (38K), `time/driver.rs` (53K), `time/intrusive_wheel.rs` (41K), `lab/virtual_time_wheel.rs` (19K) |

### F06 — Async I/O Traits and Extensions

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio::io::{AsyncRead, AsyncWrite, AsyncBufRead, AsyncSeek}`, `tokio-util::io` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/io/{read.rs, write.rs, buf_reader.rs, buf_writer.rs, seek.rs, split.rs, lines.rs, copy.rs}` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **active** — core traits present; some tokio-util convenience adapters may be missing |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** — traits deterministic, underlying I/O real-time |
| Key files | `io/cap.rs` (84K, capability-gated I/O), `io/copy.rs` (37K), `io/buf_reader.rs` (16K), `io/buf_writer.rs` (18K), `io/write_permit.rs` (two-phase writes) |
| Gaps | `tokio-util::io::SinkWriter` adapter remains missing. `ReaderStream` + `StreamReader` are now implemented in `src/io/stream_adapters.rs`. |

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|

| Asupersync surface | `src/codec/` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **active** — core codec traits and framing present |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `src/codec/` directory |

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|

| Asupersync surface | `src/bytes/` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **complete** — full Bytes/BytesMut implementation |
| Maturity | **mature** |

### F09 — Reactor / I/O Event Backend

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | Tokio + Mio internals (epoll, kqueue, IOCP) |
| Asupersync surface | `src/runtime/reactor/{epoll.rs, kqueue.rs, windows.rs, lab.rs}`, `io_uring` feature |
| Ownership | **core** (io_uring: **feature-gated**) |
| Parity | **active** — epoll, kqueue, io_uring, lab reactor |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** — lab reactor fully deterministic; real reactors real-time |
| Key files | `runtime/reactor/` directory, `runtime/io_driver.rs` (60K) |
| Notes | Uses `polling` crate (platform-abstracted) on non-wasm targets. io_uring via `dep:io-uring` on Linux. |

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio::net::{TcpListener, TcpStream, UdpSocket, UnixListener, UnixStream, UnixDatagram}` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/net/{tcp/, udp.rs, unix/}` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **active** — listener, stream, datagram types for all three socket families |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `net/tcp/` directory, `net/udp.rs` (19K), `net/unix/` directory |
| Notes | Uses `socket2` for low-level socket creation on non-wasm targets. |

| Ownership | **core** |

| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |

### F12 — TLS

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio-rustls`, `tokio-native-tls` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/tls/{acceptor.rs, connector.rs, stream.rs, types.rs, error.rs}` |
| Ownership | **feature-gated** (`tls`, `tls-native-roots`, `tls-webpki-roots`) |
| Parity | **active** — rustls-backed acceptor/connector with ALPN, certificate pinning, client auth |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `tls/acceptor.rs` (28K), `tls/connector.rs` (22K), `tls/stream.rs` (21K), `tls/types.rs` (26K) |
| Notes | No `native-tls` backend; rustls-only by design. Feature gates control root certificate source. |

| Tokio surface | `tokio-tungstenite` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/net/websocket/` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **active** — native WebSocket implementation (no tungstenite dependency) |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |

### F14 — HTTP/1.1 + HTTP/2

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `hyper`, `h2`, `http-body`, `hyper-util` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/http/{h1/, h2/, body.rs, pool.rs, compress.rs}` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **active** — native HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 implementations, connection pooling, body streaming |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `http/h2/` directory, `http/h1/` directory, `http/body.rs` (32K), `http/pool.rs` (23K), `http/compress.rs` (19K) |
| Notes | Fully native — no hyper/h2 crate dependency. Includes HPACK, flow control, stream multiplexing. |

### F15 — QUIC + HTTP/3

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `quinn`, `h3`, `h3-quinn` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/net/{quic/, quic_core/, quic_native/}`, `src/http/{h3/, h3_native.rs}` |
| Ownership | **feature-gated** (`quic`, `http3`) for native rollout; **compat-only** (`quic-compat`, `http3-compat`) for legacy wrapper boundary |
| Parity | **partial** — T4.2/T4.3 transport parity is closed for handshake lifecycle, stream transitions, loss-recovery, and flow/congestion stress correctness; advanced RFC-complete QUIC/H3 behavior remains in progress |
| Maturity | **active** — feature surfaces are unparked in Cargo/public API while native closure continues |
| Determinism | N/A |
| Key files | `http/h3_native.rs` (84K), `net/quic_core/` directory, `net/quic_native/` directory |
| Gaps | **CRITICAL for full-replacement claim.** Remaining closure work is concentrated in connection migration, 0-RTT/resumption, and interop matrix coverage. Legacy quinn/h3 wrappers remain quarantined behind compat-only feature gates. |

| Axis | Value |

| Asupersync surface | `src/web/{router.rs, handler.rs, middleware.rs, extract.rs, response.rs, request_region.rs, debug.rs}`, `src/server/`, `src/service/` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **active** — routing, extractors, middleware, request-scoped regions |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `web/router.rs` (21K), `web/middleware.rs` (28K), `web/extract.rs` (19K), `web/response.rs` (14K), `web/request_region.rs` (20K), `server/connection.rs` (32K), `server/shutdown.rs` (29K) |
| Additional | `web/nextjs_bootstrap.rs` (27K) — Next.js-style bootstrap, no Tokio equivalent |
| Gaps | Missing: multipart form handling, SSE helpers, cookie extraction, CORS middleware, some tower-http equivalents. Need itemized gap list. |

| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **active** — unary/streaming RPCs, health checks, interceptors, protobuf codec |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `grpc/client.rs` (33K), `grpc/server.rs` (23K), `grpc/streaming.rs` (22K), `grpc/codec.rs` (20K), `grpc/health.rs` (24K), `grpc/interceptor.rs` (24K) |
| Notes | Native implementation — no tonic/prost dependency. Uses built-in protobuf codec. |

### F18 — Database Clients

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tokio-postgres`, `mysql_async`, `sqlx`, `diesel-async` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/database/{postgres.rs, mysql.rs, sqlite.rs}` |
| Ownership | **feature-gated** (`postgres`, `mysql`, `sqlite`) |
| Parity | **active** — wire-protocol implementations for all three databases |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `database/postgres.rs` (95K), `database/mysql.rs` (70K), `database/sqlite.rs` (40K) |
| Notes | PostgreSQL and MySQL use native wire protocol implementations (no C library dependency). SQLite uses `rusqlite` with bundled feature. No ORM layer — that's companion-crate territory. |
| Gaps | Missing: connection pooling abstraction, prepared statement caching, `sqlx`-style compile-time checked queries. |

### F19 — Messaging Clients

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `redis` (crate), `async-nats`, `rdkafka`, `lapin` (AMQP), `rumqttc` (MQTT) |
| Asupersync surface | `src/messaging/{redis.rs, nats.rs, kafka.rs, kafka_consumer.rs, jetstream.rs}` |
| Ownership | **feature-gated** (`kafka` via `dep:rdkafka`); redis/nats: **core** |
| Parity | **partial** — Redis, NATS (with JetStream), Kafka present; AMQP and MQTT missing |
| Maturity | **early** |
| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `messaging/nats.rs` (50K), `messaging/redis.rs` (38K), `messaging/kafka.rs` (33K), `messaging/jetstream.rs` (46K), `messaging/kafka_consumer.rs` (18K) |
| Gaps | **AMQP/RabbitMQ client** — no equivalent of `lapin`. **MQTT client** — no equivalent of `rumqttc`. These are needed for IoT and enterprise messaging replacement claims. |

### F20 — Service / Middleware Stack

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tower`, `tower-layer`, `tower-service`, `tower-http` |
| Asupersync surface | `src/service/{service.rs, layer.rs, builder.rs, timeout.rs, retry.rs, rate_limit.rs, concurrency_limit.rs, load_shed.rs}` |
| Ownership | **core** (optional `tower` adapter: **feature-gated**) |
| Parity | **active** — native Service trait + all major middleware layers |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **strong** (lab-compatible) |
| Key files | `service/service.rs` (42K), `service/rate_limit.rs` (27K), `service/retry.rs` (23K), `service/concurrency_limit.rs` (28K), `service/load_shed.rs` (18K), `service/timeout.rs` (14K) |
| Notes | Native `AsupersyncService` trait is cancel-aware and capability-scoped. Optional `tower` feature provides bidirectional adapter for Tower compatibility. |

| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **partial** — file I/O, directory operations, metadata, open options, io_uring fast path present; some convenience functions may be missing |

| Determinism | **mixed** |
| Key files | `fs/uring.rs` (32K), `fs/vfs.rs` (20K), `fs/path_ops.rs` (13K), `fs/file.rs` (11K) |
| Gaps | Need: `tokio::fs::symlink`, `hard_link`, `rename`, `copy`, `canonicalize` equivalents audit. VFS layer for lab determinism needs completion. |

### F26 — Deterministic Concurrency Testing

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `loom`, `tokio-test`, external harnesses |
| Asupersync surface | `src/lab/` (20+ files), `frankenlab/`, optional `loom-tests` feature |
| Ownership | **core** + **companion** (`frankenlab`) + **feature-gated** (`loom-tests`) |
| Parity | **complete** — this is an Asupersync differentiator; Tokio has no integrated equivalent |
| Maturity | **mature** |
| Determinism | **strong** (this IS the determinism layer) |
| Key files | `lab/runtime.rs` (154K), `lab/explorer.rs` (57K), `lab/conformal.rs` (53K), `lab/injection.rs` (40K), `lab/chaos.rs` (35K), `lab/replay.rs` (39K), `lab/scenario.rs` (35K) |
| Notes | LabRuntime, virtual time, deterministic scheduling, seed-based replay, chaos injection, conformal prediction, scenario runner, oracle suite, snapshot/restore. No Tokio equivalent exists. |

### F27 — Resilience Combinators

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | `tower::retry`, `tower::timeout`, `tokio-retry`, various middleware |
| Asupersync surface | `src/combinator/{circuit_breaker.rs, bulkhead.rs, retry.rs, rate_limit.rs, timeout.rs, hedge.rs, bracket.rs, pipeline.rs, race.rs, join.rs, select.rs, first_ok.rs, map_reduce.rs, quorum.rs, laws.rs}` |
| Ownership | **core** |
| Parity | **complete** — far exceeds Tokio ecosystem offering |
| Maturity | **active** |
| Determinism | **strong** (lab-compatible) |
| Key files | `combinator/circuit_breaker.rs` (66K), `combinator/rate_limit.rs` (52K), `combinator/bulkhead.rs` (50K), `combinator/pipeline.rs` (46K), `combinator/laws.rs` (40K), `combinator/retry.rs` (39K) |
| Notes | Algebraic combinator laws with property tests. Circuit breaker, bulkhead, hedge, quorum, map-reduce — well beyond tower middleware. |

### F28 — Tokio-Locked Third-Party Crate Interoperability

| Axis | Value |
|------|-------|
| Tokio surface | Any crate requiring `tokio::runtime::Handle`, `tokio::spawn`, Tokio-specific traits |
| Asupersync surface | Boundary adapters via `src/service/` runtime integration points, optional `tower` feature |
| Ownership | **feature-gated** (`tower` adapter) + **planned** (broader compatibility shim) |
| Parity | **adapter** — requires per-crate evaluation |
| Maturity | N/A |
| Determinism | N/A |
| Gaps | **CRITICAL.** Major Tokio-locked crates include: `reqwest`, `sqlx` (runtime selection), `sea-orm`, `tonic` (if not using native gRPC), `lapin`, `rumqttc`, `opensearch`, `elasticsearch`. Each needs either a native replacement or a compatibility adapter. This is tracked as TOKIO-REPLACE T7. |

---

## 3. Asupersync-Only Capabilities (No Tokio Equivalent)

These capability families exist in Asupersync but have no direct Tokio
ecosystem counterpart. They are not required for parity but represent
additional value:

| ID | Family | Key Surface | Ownership |
|----|--------|-------------|-----------|
| X01 | Actor System | `src/actor.rs` (70K) | core |
| X02 | Supervision Trees | `src/supervision.rs` (282K) | core |
| X03 | Obligation Tracking | `src/obligation/` (17 files, 680K+) | core |
| X04 | Capability Security | `src/cx/macaroon.rs` (85K), `src/security/` | core |
| X05 | Distributed Coordination | `src/distributed/` (9 files) | core |
| X06 | Saga / Distributed Transactions | `src/obligation/saga.rs`, `src/plan/` | core |
| X07 | RaptorQ FEC | `src/raptorq/` | core |
| X08 | Formal Verification | `formal/lean/`, `formal/tla/` | companion |
| X09 | Transport Abstraction | `src/transport/` (8 files) | core |
| X10 | Migration Framework | `src/migration/` | core |
| X11 | Evidence / Decision Framework | `franken_evidence`, `franken_kernel`, `franken_decision` | companion |
| X12 | Console / Dashboard | `src/console.rs` (34K), debug-server feature | feature-gated |
| X13 | Conformance Suite | `conformance/` crate | companion |
| X14 | Session-Typed Channels | `src/channel/session.rs` | core |
| X15 | Epoch-Based Reclamation | `src/epoch.rs` (92K) | core |
| X16 | GenServer (Erlang-style) | `src/gen_server.rs` (188K) | core |

---

## 4. Gap Summary for Full-Replacement Claim

### 4.1 Critical Gaps (Blockers)

| # | Gap | Tokio Equivalent | Status | Tracked |
|---|-----|-------------------|--------|---------|
| G1 | QUIC transport completion | `quinn` | Parked — native rewrite in progress | T4 |
| G2 | HTTP/3 framing completion | `h3` | Parked — depends on G1 | T4 |
| G3 | Tokio-locked crate compatibility layer | Various | Planned | T7 |
| G4 | `reqwest`-equivalent HTTP client | `reqwest` | No standalone client API | T5/T7 |

### 4.2 Important Gaps (Significant but not blocking)

| # | Gap | Tokio Equivalent | Status | Tracked |
|---|-----|-------------------|--------|---------|
| G5 | AMQP/RabbitMQ client | `lapin` | Missing | T6 |
| G6 | MQTT client | `rumqttc` | Missing | T6 |
| G7 | Web framework middleware completeness | `tower-http` | Partial | T5 |
| G8 | Filesystem API completeness | `tokio::fs` full surface | Early | T3 |
| G9 | Database connection pooling | `bb8`, `deadpool`, `sqlx` pool | Missing abstraction | T6 |
| G10 | Compile-time query checking | `sqlx` macros | Out of scope (belongs in companion) | T6 |

### 4.3 Minor Gaps (Polish)

| # | Gap | Tokio Equivalent | Status |
|---|-----|-------------------|--------|
| G11 | tokio-util I/O adapters | `ReaderStream`, `StreamReader` | Easy additions to `src/io/` |
| G12 | Signal Windows support | `tokio::signal::windows` | Platform-specific |
| G13 | Process pty support | Various crates | Edge case |

---

## 5. Ownership Boundary Summary

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     CORE (always compiled)                    │
│                                                               │
│  Runtime · Cx · Regions · Channels · Sync · Time · Cancel    │
│  I/O traits · Codec · Bytes · Net · DNS · WebSocket          │
│  HTTP/1+2 · gRPC · Web · Service · Stream · Signals         │
│  Process · Combinators · Actors · Supervision · Lab          │
│  Observability (native) · Distributed · Transport            │
│  RaptorQ · GenServer · Obligations · Security                │
└──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
┌──────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────┐
│                  FEATURE-GATED (opt-in)                       │
│                                                               │
│  tls / tls-native-roots / tls-webpki-roots                   │
│  postgres / mysql / sqlite                                    │
│  kafka (rdkafka)                                              │
│  tower (adapter)                                              │
│  metrics (OpenTelemetry)                                      │
│  tracing-integration                                          │
│  io-uring (Linux)                                             │
│  loom-tests                                                   │
│  proc-macros                                                  │
│  cli / config-file / trace-compression / debug-server        │
│  wasm-browser-* profiles                                      │
│  simd-intrinsics (RaptorQ acceleration)                      │
└──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
┌──────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────┐
│                   COMPANION CRATES                            │
│                                                               │
│  frankenlab — extended lab/test infrastructure                │
│  conformance — conformance test suite + reporting            │
│  franken_kernel — FrankenSuite kernel types                  │
│  franken_evidence — evidence ledger                          │
│  franken_decision — decision contracts                       │
│  asupersync-macros — proc macros (scope!, spawn!, etc.)      │
└──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
┌──────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────┐
│                   OUT OF SCOPE                                │
│                                                               │
│  ORM layer (sea-orm equivalent)                              │
│  Compile-time query macros (sqlx::query! equivalent)         │
│  Full web framework (actix-web is its own runtime)           │
│  Template engines (askama, tera)                             │
│  Email sending (lettre)                                       │
│  Cron scheduling (tokio-cron-scheduler)                      │
│  GraphQL server (async-graphql)                              │
│  Search clients (elasticsearch, opensearch)                  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Total capability families | 28 |
| Complete parity | 8 (F01, F02, F03, F04, F05, F08, F26, F27) |
| Active parity | 14 (F06, F07, F09–F14, F16–F18, F20, F22–F25) |
| Partial / early | 4 (F15, F19, F21, F28) |
| Core ownership | 22 families |
| Feature-gated | 5 families (F09 partial, F12, F18, F19 partial, F28) |
| Companion crate | 2 families (F26 partial, X08, X11, X13) |
| Asupersync-only extras | 16 families |
| Critical gaps blocking replacement claim | 4 (G1–G4) |
| Important gaps | 6 (G5–G10) |
| Minor gaps | 3 (G11–G13) |
